title: flair-bench share result v1
description: Schema for a single --share result JSON emitted by @tpsdev-ai/flair-bench (tpsdev-ai/flair packages/flair-bench). Derived byte-for-byte from that package's ShareDocument type (src/types.ts) and buildShareDocument (src/share.ts) as of flair main, toolVersion 0.1.0 — see schema/versions.json for which toolVersion(s) this file covers. Additive-only discipline: this file is never edited once a toolVersion maps to it; a shape change ships as schema/result.v2.json (etc.) with a new schema/versions.json entry, never a modification here. Strict: additionalProperties is false at every level, so hostname/filesystem-path/username fields (which the tool's own privacy contract forbids — see share.ts's header) are rejected by omission, in addition to the separate forbidden-content sweep in .github/workflows/validate.yml.

toolVersion.description: @tpsdev-ai/flair-bench version that produced this document (version.ts's TOOL_VERSION). Used as the schema-selection discriminator — see schema/versions.json.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the run (new Date().toISOString() in share.ts).

name.description: Model family name, derived from fileBasename with the .gguf extension and quant/variant suffix stripped (share.ts's deriveModelName).

fileBasename.description: Basename of the GGUF file — NEVER a full path. share.ts's privacy contract forbids a path separator here; this is also checked independently by the forbidden-content sweep.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the GGUF file, lowercase hex.

paramsApprox.description: Approximate total parameter count, summed from the GGUF's tensor index (ModelIdentity.paramsApprox).

label.description: Freeform, user-chosen host/infra grouping label (--label). NEVER auto-filled from the machine's real hostname. Optional — omitted entirely (not empty string) when the caller passed none.

ramGiB.description: Total system RAM in GiB, rounded to 1 decimal (share.ts).

gpu.description: Joined GPU device name(s) node-llama-cpp reports, or null when backend is cpu.

perKind.description: Record<QueryKind, PerKindStat> — the four fixed query kinds the flair-bench corpus defines (src/corpus-v2.ts). All four are always present.

msPerEmbedSerialWarm.description: Serial, warm (post-warmup), N>=64 embed calls; mean ms/embed, rounded to 2 decimals.

peakRssMiB.description: Peak process RSS delta (MiB) observed during this model's load+embed phase, minus the pre-load baseline, rounded to 1 decimal.

n.description: Query count this stat is computed over.
